parsed.dominant_narrative: Internal insiders and official accounts confirm Lil Baby's feature on Drake's Iceman album, supported by social media signals, deep industry ties, and creative alignment.
parsed.contrarian_narrative: Market pricing at 20% and skepticism from a music blogger citing Drake's recent collaborations with other artists and potential artistic direction conflicts suggest uncertainty.
parsed.final_reasoning: Weighted average of agent estimates (90%, 80-90%, 70-85%, 40%) yields approximately 75%, with the report's synthesis range of 65-85% supporting this midpoint.
